label: How it works
paragraphs: See something you love? Click **Enquire Now** and a template email will pop up for you to message the lister directly.
Use the email to ask questions, confirm your rental dates and agree the details before going ahead.

label: Before you rent
paragraphs: Before confirming, check the size, condition, location, rental dates and any notes from the lister.
We recommend the lister confirming the item’s condition by email and takes clear photos before handover.

label: Payments and deposits
paragraphs: For now, payments are agreed directly with the lister. Use your enquiry email to confirm the rental fee, payment method and any refundable deposit, any delivery and return costs and when payments and refunds should be made.
For example, if a dress is £30 to rent and you agree a £20 refundable deposit, the renter pays £50 upftont and gets £20 back once the item is returned safely and in the agreed condition.

We recommend using a secure, traceable option like PayPal, bank transfer or another payment method that gives you a clear record. Avoid cash where possible and keep everything confirmed in writing before handover.

label: Shipping and delivery
paragraphs: Agree how you'll get the item — whether that's collection, delivery or postage — and when it needs to be returned.

For delivery, we recommend using tracked shipping or courier services where possible such as Royal Mail, Evri and DPD. The lister should share the tracking number with the renter once the item has been sent.
For collection, choose a mutually agreed public place. Any delivery or return costs should be agreed before the rental is confirmed.

label: Returns
paragraphs: Returns should be agreed before the rental is confirmed. Make sure you're both clear on:
bullets: How it will be returned, whether by collection, drop-off or postage and costs, including any costs
The condition on return, as items should be returned in the same condition they were received
Late returns, including any late fees, which should be agreed upfront
Damage and how this will be handled if the item is not returned in the agreed condition
secondaryParagraphs: If an item is returned damaged, listers and renters should try to resolve this directly first. Keep all communications by email. If you can't resolve a dispute, contact us at hello@aso-wa.com and we'll aim to support where we can.

label: Disclaimer
paragraphs: ASO WA connects renters and listers. While ASO WA is in its early launch phase, payments, deposits, delivery and returns are agreed directly between users, while we build our in-platform payment experience. Before sending or receiving an item, we recommend confirming the condition in writing and taking clear photos. If you need to report a listing or user, contact hello@aso-wa.com.
